name: spark
description: Connect Codex to a scoped Spark instance.

interface.shortDescription: Use scoped Spark tools from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex terminal sessions to Spark through user-controlled scoped API tokens. Codex must use /api/codex/* endpoints so Spark Settings can enforce tool access.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Spark only through configured scoped access. Check capabilities before reading or writing data.
